## Checklist

- [ ] Code changes pass `make test` / `make lint` (or repo-equivalent)
- [ ] CHANGELOG updated (if applicable)
- [ ] **ADRs in [`aida-core/.github-private/decisions/`](https://github.com/aida-core/.github-private/tree/main/decisions) updated if architecture or process changed** — see [ADR-0001](https://github.com/aida-core/.github-private/blob/main/decisions/0001-org-policy-enforcement.md) for what counts as architecture/process here
